training.notes: No offline training; vectorizer fit per request on shared corpus [cv] + jobs.

fairness.notes: Per-bucket Top-1 to be filled when running stratified eval; under-sample behavior: see config/promotion_criteria.json fairness_gates.insufficient_bucket_samples

approvals.reason: Registry bootstrap; baseline is current production behavior.

risks: Lexical overlap only; may miss semantic matches or multilingual CVs.
intended_use: Rank Ethiopian Airlines trainee roles for a single CV against up to 8 job descriptions.
limitations: Not trained on live hiring outcomes; labels on synthetic data are heuristic.
